title: CherryVillage
description: Add Cherry Village for cherry grove.
body:
![Cherry Village](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/25/F7PqTBgxLlv9H3C.jpg)
Discord Link: https://discord.gg/pDaMyHDfBy

#### New Village for cherry grove!

This mod add a new village variant in Minecraft, it will generate in cherry grove.

Using mushroom, cherry plank and deepslate rebuild all village buildings.



#### For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!
